query:
INSERT INTO quiz_questions (lessonId, question, questionType, options, correctAnswer, questionOrder) VALUES
-- Lesson 1: Biblical Foundation for Evangelism (360041)
(360041, 'The Great Commission is found in:', 'multiple_choice', '["Genesis 1:28","Matthew 28:18-20","Romans 10:9","Revelation 22:17"]', 'Matthew 28:18-20', 1),
(360041, 'The Greek word for gospel (euangelion) means:', 'multiple_choice', '["Religious teaching","Good news","Sacred text","Divine command"]', 'Good news', 2),
(360041, 'According to Romans 10:14-15, evangelism requires:', 'multiple_choice', '["Special training only","Someone to be sent and proclaim","Natural talent","Academic credentials"]', 'Someone to be sent and proclaim', 3),
(360041, 'Jesus'' primary method of evangelism was:', 'multiple_choice', '["Mass media campaigns","Relational and personal","Political influence","Written literature"]', 'Relational and personal', 4),
(360041, 'The early church grew primarily through:', 'multiple_choice', '["Government support","Personal witness and proclamation","Military conquest","Economic incentives"]', 'Personal witness and proclamation', 5),
(360041, 'Biblical evangelism is motivated by:', 'multiple_choice', '["Guilt and obligation","Love for God and people","Competition with other religions","Personal recognition"]', 'Love for God and people', 6),
(360041, 'The power for effective evangelism comes from:', 'multiple_choice', '["Human persuasion","The Holy Spirit","Marketing techniques","Cultural relevance"]', 'The Holy Spirit', 7),
(360041, 'Every believer is called to:', 'multiple_choice', '["Professional ministry only","Be a witness for Christ","Remain silent about faith","Delegate evangelism to pastors"]', 'Be a witness for Christ', 8),
(360041, 'The goal of evangelism is:', 'multiple_choice', '["Church membership","Making disciples of all nations","Religious debate","Cultural transformation"]', 'Making disciples of all nations', 9),
(360041, 'Acts 1:8 describes evangelism as:', 'multiple_choice', '["Optional activity","Progressive witness from local to global","Professional ministry","Institutional program"]', 'Progressive witness from local to global', 10),
(360041, 'Explain the biblical basis for personal evangelism and why every believer should share their faith.', 'short_answer', NULL, 'The Great Commission commands all believers to make disciples. The love of Christ compels us, and the Holy Spirit empowers us to be witnesses starting from our immediate context to the ends of the earth.', 11),
-- Lesson 2: The Gospel Message (360042)
(360042, 'The essential content of the gospel includes:', 'multiple_choice', '["Moral improvement","Christ''s death, burial, and resurrection","Religious rituals","Political reform"]', 'Christ''s death, burial, and resurrection', 1),
(360042, 'According to 1 Corinthians 15:3-4, the gospel is:', 'multiple_choice', '["Human philosophy","Of first importance","Secondary doctrine","Cultural tradition"]', 'Of first importance', 2),
(360042, 'The gospel addresses humanity''s fundamental problem of:', 'multiple_choice', '["Lack of education","Sin and separation from God","Economic inequality","Political oppression"]', 'Sin and separation from God', 3),
(360042, 'Salvation is received by:', 'multiple_choice', '["Good works","Grace through faith in Christ","Religious observance","Moral effort"]', 'Grace through faith in Christ', 4),
(360042, 'The gospel must be presented with:', 'multiple_choice', '["Complexity and jargon","Clarity and simplicity","Academic language","Cultural accommodation"]', 'Clarity and simplicity', 5),
(360042, 'Repentance in the gospel message means:', 'multiple_choice', '["Feeling sorry","A change of mind and direction toward God","Religious penance","Emotional experience"]', 'A change of mind and direction toward God', 6),
(360042, 'The resurrection of Christ proves:', 'multiple_choice', '["His teachings were good","His victory over sin and death","His popularity","His political influence"]', 'His victory over sin and death', 7),
(360042, 'The gospel offers:', 'multiple_choice', '["Temporary relief","Eternal life and forgiveness of sins","Material prosperity","Political freedom"]', 'Eternal life and forgiveness of sins', 8),
(360042, 'When presenting the gospel, we should:', 'multiple_choice', '["Argue and debate","Speak truth in love","Compromise the message","Avoid difficult topics"]', 'Speak truth in love', 9),
(360042, 'The gospel is the power of God for:', 'multiple_choice', '["Political change","Salvation to everyone who believes","Economic success","Social status"]', 'Salvation to everyone who believes', 10),
(360042, 'Summarize the essential elements of the gospel message that must be communicated for someone to be saved.', 'short_answer', NULL, 'The gospel includes: all have sinned, the wages of sin is death, Christ died for our sins, He rose again, and salvation comes through repentance and faith in Jesus Christ as Lord and Savior.', 11),
-- Lesson 3: Personal Evangelism Methods (360043)
(360043, 'Effective personal evangelism begins with:', 'multiple_choice', '["Memorized scripts","Prayer and relationship","Confrontation","Debate skills"]', 'Prayer and relationship', 1),
(360043, 'The bridge illustration in evangelism represents:', 'multiple_choice', '["Church membership","Christ bridging the gap between God and humanity","Religious tradition","Moral improvement"]', 'Christ bridging the gap between God and humanity', 2),
(360043, 'When sharing faith, listening is important because:', 'multiple_choice', '["It wastes time","It shows respect and helps understand the person''s needs","It avoids the gospel","It delays confrontation"]', 'It shows respect and helps understand the person''s needs', 3),
(360043, 'A personal testimony should include:', 'multiple_choice', '["Only dramatic stories","Life before Christ, how you met Christ, life after Christ","Theological arguments","Criticism of other religions"]', 'Life before Christ, how you met Christ, life after Christ', 4),
(360043, 'The most effective evangelism often occurs:', 'multiple_choice', '["In formal settings only","Through existing relationships","Through strangers only","In church buildings"]', 'Through existing relationships', 5),
(360043, 'When someone is not ready to receive Christ:', 'multiple_choice', '["Pressure them harder","Continue to love and pray for them","Give up completely","Argue until they agree"]', 'Continue to love and pray for them', 6),
(360043, 'Asking questions in evangelism helps to:', 'multiple_choice', '["Trap people","Understand their spiritual condition and engage dialogue","Show superiority","Avoid the gospel"]', 'Understand their spiritual condition and engage dialogue', 7),
(360043, 'The role of the Holy Spirit in evangelism is:', 'multiple_choice', '["Optional","Essential for conviction and conversion","Unnecessary","Secondary"]', 'Essential for conviction and conversion', 8),
(360043, 'Follow-up after someone receives Christ is:', 'multiple_choice', '["Unnecessary","Critical for spiritual growth","Optional","Someone else''s job"]', 'Critical for spiritual growth', 9),
(360043, 'Personal evangelism should be characterized by:', 'multiple_choice', '["Arrogance and judgment","Humility, love, and boldness","Fear and hesitation","Manipulation"]', 'Humility, love, and boldness', 10),
(360043, 'Describe three practical methods for sharing the gospel in personal conversations.', 'short_answer', NULL, 'Methods include: sharing personal testimony, using gospel illustrations (bridge, Romans Road), asking spiritual questions, inviting to church or Bible study, and living an authentic Christian life that opens doors for conversation.', 11);
command:
